title: Social Development Partnerships Program – Disability Component – Organizational Capacity Development Stream 1 – Funding program - Canada.ca
content:
## Social Development Partnerships Program – Disability Component – Organizational Capacity Development Stream 1
This funding opportunity aims to build and support strategic capacity development of disability organizations. It will fund projects that are disability community-led, composed of project-based activities that enhance organizational capacity and impact the extent to which organizations can participate in advancing the disability policy agenda across jurisdictions.

## Information sessions
We will hold information sessions virtually for those who are interested in applying for funding. Please email us at NC-ODI-BCPH-SDPPD-PPDSPH-GD@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca and let us know your name and language and date you prefer based on the dates below.
The sessions will be fully accessible and include American Sign Language (ASL), Langue des signes québécoise (LSQ), and Communications Access Realtime Translation (CART).
The dates for the sessions are as follows:
- November 20, 2023, 1:00 p.m. to 2:30 p.m. (EST) in English
- November 23, 2023, 1:00 p.m. to 2:30 p.m. (EST) in French
Once registered, you will receive an email invitation with a link to access the virtual session and its related materials.

## Help and contact information
- Enquiries will be answered between November 9, 2023 to December 21, 2023 at 3:00 p.m. (EST)
- Email: NC-ODI-BCPH-SDPPD-PPDSPH-GD@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca
- If you need help or accommodations (such as documents in an alternate format for example, large font, braille, etc.), please contact us by December 21, 2023 at 3:00 p.m. (EST)
- Email: NC-ODI-BCPH-SDPPD-PPDSPH-GD@hrsdc-rhdcc.gc.ca

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
